Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseMultiplier_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the data collection settings for better analytics.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps developers understand player behavior more accurately, leading to improved game features.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryRandomOffsetRangeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the timing for retrying telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures better data tracking and performance insights for developers, indirectly benefiting players.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryBaseRetryTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the time the system waits before retrying telemetry data collection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data tracking for better game performance insights.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxBackoffTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum wait time for telemetry data to be sent if there are issues.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother data reporting and better game monitoring for developers.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxConcurrentRetriedRequests_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of retry attempts for telemetry data requests.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the reliability of data collection, ensuring better game performance insights for developers.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxElapsedTimeMs_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a maximum time limit for tracking performance data.
Added_Other.purpose: Helps ensure that performance metrics are collected efficiently, leading to a smoother gaming experience.

Added_Other.name: DFIntRbxTelemetryMaxRetryAttempts_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on how many times the system will try to send data if it fails initially.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves data reliability and performance by managing retries effectively.

Added_Other.name: FFlagRbxTelemetryEnableHttpRetries3_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Allows the system to retry HTTP requests up to three times if they fail.
Added_Other.purpose: Increases the reliability of data collection and improves overall user experience.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnConnectFail_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Retries telemetry data sending if the initial connection fails.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that player data is accurately tracked even if there are temporary connection issues.

Added_Other.name: FFlagTelemetryRetryOnDnsResolve_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables retries for DNS resolution failures to ensure data can be sent correctly.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the accuracy of telemetry data, leading to better game performance insights.
